Name: Text input box
Default State: When this dialog box pop up, the text input box is in the focus state by default.
Description: The field where users can enter text
Dynamic Behaviour:
When this dialog box pop up, the text input box is in the focus state by default.

The text input box height is fixed. When the text is longer than the input box, display scroll bar.

Name: Text input label
Description: The label tells what need to text in the box

Name: Modal title
Description: This title let users know they are editing which column property
